'''鈭歞h-zh-k''' ('''kadhazhak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:june|june]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:june|june]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-zh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadhazhak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhazhak|thidhazhak]] || [[word:jidhazhak|jidhazhak]] || [[word:shidhazhak|shidhazhak]] || [[word:kidhazhak|kidhazhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhazhak|thuthudhazhak]] || [[word:jujudhazhak|jujudhazhak]] || [[word:shushudhazhak|shushudhazhak]] || [[word:kukudhazhak|kukudhazhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhazhak|thudhazhak]] || [[word:judhazhak|judhazhak]] || [[word:shudhazhak|shudhazhak]] || [[word:kudhazhak|kudhazhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhazhak|thudhazhak]] || [[word:judhazhak|judhazhak]] || [[word:shudhazhak|shudhazhak]] || [[word:kudhazhak|kudhazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhazhak|thedhazhak]] || [[word:jedhazhak|jedhazhak]] || [[word:shedhazhak|shedhazhak]] || [[word:kedhazhak|kedhazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhazhak|thothodhazhak]] || [[word:jojodhazhak|jojodhazhak]] || [[word:shoshodhazhak|shoshodhazhak]] || [[word:kokodhazhak|kokodhazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazhak|thodhazhak]] || [[word:jodhazhak|jodhazhak]] || [[word:shodhazhak|shodhazhak]] || [[word:kodhazhak|kodhazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazhak|thodhazhak]] || [[word:jodhazhak|jodhazhak]] || [[word:shodhazhak|shodhazhak]] || [[word:kodhazhak|kodhazhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]] || [[word:dhazhak|dhazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhazhak|th忙dhazhak]] || [[word:j忙dhazhak|j忙dhazhak]] || [[word:sh忙dhazhak|sh忙dhazhak]] || [[word:k忙dhazhak|k忙dhazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhazhak|thathadhazhak]] || [[word:jajadhazhak|jajadhazhak]] || [[word:shashadhazhak|shashadhazhak]] || [[word:kakadhazhak|kakadhazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhazhak|thadhazhak]] || [[word:jadhazhak|jadhazhak]] || [[word:shadhazhak|shadhazhak]] || [[word:kadhazhak|kadhazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhazhak|thadhazhak]] || [[word:jadhazhak|jadhazhak]] || [[word:shadhazhak|shadhazhak]] || [[word:kadhazhak|kadhazhak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhazhak|shadhazhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhazhak|goshadhazhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhazhak|gokishadhazhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhakn眉|shadhazhakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkn眉|goshadhazhaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakn眉|gokishadhazhakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhazhaksh毛|shadhazhaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknksh毛|goshadhazhaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhazhaksh毛|gokishadhazhaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhakro|shadhazhakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkro|goshadhazhaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakro|gokishadhazhakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhakmu|shadhazhakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkmu|goshadhazhaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakmu|gokishadhazhakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhazhaksher|shadhazhaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknksher|goshadhazhaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhazhaksher|gokishadhazhaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhazhakng|shadhazhakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkng|goshadhazhaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakng|gokishadhazhakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhazhakya|shadhazhakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkya|goshadhazhaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakya|gokishadhazhakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhazhakyam|shadhazhakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkyam|goshadhazhaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakyam|gokishadhazhakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazhakn眉sh毛|shadhazhakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkn眉sh毛|goshadhazhaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakn眉sh毛|gokishadhazhakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhakn眉ro|shadhazhakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkn眉ro|goshadhazhaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakn眉ro|gokishadhazhakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhakn眉mu|shadhazhakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkn眉mu|goshadhazhaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakn眉mu|gokishadhazhakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhaksh毛n眉|shadhazhaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknksh毛n眉|goshadhazhaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhaksh毛n眉|gokishadhazhaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhaksh毛ro|shadhazhaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknksh毛ro|goshadhazhaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhaksh毛ro|gokishadhazhaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhaksh毛mu|shadhazhaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknksh毛mu|goshadhazhaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhaksh毛mu|gokishadhazhaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhakron眉|shadhazhakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkron眉|goshadhazhaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakron眉|gokishadhazhakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazhakrosh毛|shadhazhakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkrosh毛|goshadhazhaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakrosh毛|gokishadhazhakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazhakromu|shadhazhakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkromu|goshadhazhaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakromu|gokishadhazhakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazhakmun眉|shadhazhakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkmun眉|goshadhazhaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakmun眉|gokishadhazhakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazhakmush毛|shadhazhakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkmush毛|goshadhazhaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakmush毛|gokishadhazhakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazhakmuro|shadhazhakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazhaknkmuro|goshadhazhaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazhakmuro|gokishadhazhakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
